name: OPC Agent Orchestration
description: OPC (One-Person Company) multi-agent orchestration methodology for OpenClaw. Covers role design, task decomposition, Heartbeat protocol, cost tracking, and collaboration patterns. Includes marketing campaign scenario and structured OKR→Epic→Task breakdown.
review: Innovative multi-agent orchestration skill with solid OPC methodology. OPC/PaperClip framework applied to OpenClaw is novel with no equivalent in the marketplace. Primarily in Chinese but well-structured with references, templates, and scenarios.
